children.label: A
children.text: solid ammonium nitrate that is chiefly the ammonium salt of nitric acid and contains not less than 33 percent nitrogen by weight; and

children.label: B
children.text: any mixture containing a percentage of ammonium nitrate that is equal to or greater than the percentage determined by the Secretary under .section 488a(b) of this title

children.heading: Ammonium nitrate facility
children.label: 2 Ammonium nitrate facility
children.text: The term “ammonium nitrate facility” means any entity that produces, sells or otherwise transfers ownership of, or provides application services for ammonium nitrate.

children.heading: Ammonium nitrate purchaser
children.label: 3 Ammonium nitrate purchaser
children.text: The term “ammonium nitrate purchaser” means any person who purchases ammonium nitrate from an ammonium nitrate facility.
